title: Manhunt Compass
description:
Adds a compass that can be used to track players.
Multiple players supported.
body:
Minecraft Manhunt Compass Mod

What this does?

Adds a player tracker compass to Minecraft. This Compass can be used to track speedrunners.
Useful for the minigame 'Minecraft Manhunt'

MULTIPLE SPEEDRUNNERS / MULTIPLE HUNTERS IS SUPPORTED

How to use?

Installing the mod:

Drag and drop to the mods folder on the server only. Client side not required.

Using the compass:

Right click the compass. It will then point towards the nearest runner.
1.

Commands:

1. /runner : Adds a runner to the runner list;
1. /clearrunners Deletes the entire list of runners.
1. /runnerlist Prints the list of runners in chat.
1. /track Gives a compass.
1. /startmanhunt Sets all players health to maximum, fills hunger bar, and sets time of day to morning in preparation for Manhunt. (available from version 1.1+ only)
